arts.ttl: £70m Chelsea ace that Man United want agreeable to Bayern switch
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to be the big movers and shakers in the transfer window again, and Christopher Nkunku is agreeable to a move to Bayern Munich if the Bundesliga giants can agree to pay the £70m asking price. The Daily Mail note that Man United have already made what they call a shock loan enquiry, […] The post £70m Chelsea ace that Man United want agreeable to Bayern switch appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Real Madrid wants Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich, but is it a fit?; Karim Adeyemi staying at Borussia Dortmund; Neymar headed home; Bayer Leverkusen eyeing Evan Ferguson; Angelo Stiller extends deal with VfB Stuttgart; and MORE!
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly “angry” with how Liverpool star, Trent Alexander-Arnold, has acted amid their growing interest, and they have sounded out the prospect of signing Bayern Munich ace, Joshua Kimmich, instead, as per Sky Sports Switzerland. Real Madrid has not been able to lock down a deal for Liverpool FC star Trent Alexander-Arnold, so it could turn to Bayern Munich ’s Joshua Kimmich to fill the void:

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Slovan Bratislava: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich take on Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Thomas Müller “knows what’s at stake” for Bayern Munich vs. ŠK Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Thomas Müller can see that his squad will have an advantage over Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League on Wednesday, but that doesn’t mean the Bavarians will be looking past the 35th placed team (entering the match day). We know what’s at stake, we want to win the game and then we’ll see what place we finish the league phase in and what happens next.”

arts.ttl: Jonas Urbig made a good first impression in his first training session with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Urbig made a very good impression and received a lot of praise from Rechner [ @BILD ] pic.twitter.com/kkiNfMJQ56 I’m looking forward to getting to know the players, the staff, and the staff from Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany spent time looking at scenarios for Champions League, tackles situations surrounding Mathys Tel, Manuel Neuer, Eric Dier during presser
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany broke out his spreadsheets (no #BrazzoPowerPoint needed) to try and figure out what needs to happen for his team to avoid a playoff round in the Champions League . It’s a home game and we’re strong at home,” said Kompany (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Report: Mathys Tel wants to leave Bayern Munich; Chelsea, Manchester United ready to pounce
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Manchester United want Chelsea’s Christopher Nkunku, while Chelsea and United want Tel per Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg : It is not clear from Romano’s report or any of the subsequent reporting below on whether or not Tel wants a permanent move or a loan, but it is clear that the wheels are turning for some clubs — including Chelsea FC and Olympique Marseille per Sky Sport journalist Kerry Hau :

arts.ttl: Chelsea re-open talks over wantaway Bayern Munich star Mathys Tel - but face competiton from SEVEN rivals for young forward's signature
arts.sum: The Frenchman had told Chelsea he wanted to stay in Germany following their enquiry early in the window but he has failed to figure in the last three games.

arts.ttl: Man Utd reach agreement as Chelsea receive HUGE Mathys Tel boost: FootballTransfers recap
arts.sum: Man Utd reach agreement as Chelsea receive HUGE Mathys Tel boost: FootballTransfers recap Man Utd agree Arsenal deal

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs. ŠK Slovan Bratislava (Champions League)
arts.sum: Now, though, the Bavarians will host Slovan Bratislava in a match they they need to win. Of course, Bayern Munich’s ultimate fate will not be determined until many other results play out, but it all starts with a win in this match.
